# docs.21.dev

> Interactive API documentation for the swift-secp256k1 Swift package — DocC-generated reference with search, type hierarchies, and source links for the P256K and ZKP modules.

This subdomain serves DocC-generated HTML documentation for the swift-secp256k1 package. The content is interactive and searchable, designed for human browsing in a web browser.

Things to know about this documentation:

- Pages are rendered client-side by Swift-DocC-Render, a Vue.js single-page application that reads JSON data produced by Swift-DocC — there is no backend server
- Navigation uses DocC's standard sidebar with type hierarchies and symbol search
- Source links in the DocC HTML point to exact line numbers in the GitHub repository
- For LLM consumption, prefer md.21.dev which serves a markdown export of the same DocC archive without HTML/JS overhead

## Documentation

- [P256K Module](https://docs.21.dev/documentation/p256k/): Elliptic curve cryptography — key generation, ECDSA signing, ECDH key agreement, public key recovery
- [ZKP Module](https://docs.21.dev/documentation/zkp/): Zero-knowledge proofs — Pedersen commitments, range proofs, Schnorr signatures

## Example

- [SharedSecret — this site](https://docs.21.dev/documentation/p256k/sharedsecret): Interactive DocC page (Vue.js SPA, requires JavaScript to render)
- [SharedSecret — md.21.dev](https://md.21.dev/p256k/sharedsecret.md): Same symbol as plain markdown (LLM-readable without JavaScript)

## Related

- [md.21.dev llms.txt](https://md.21.dev/llms.txt): LLM-optimized markdown version of this documentation
- [21.dev llms.txt](https://21.dev/llms.txt): Hub llms.txt with full project context and cross-subdomain links
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/21-DOT-DEV/swift-secp256k1): Swift package source, issues, and releases
